title: tragia praetervisa var. unicolor
intro: Tragia praetervisa var. unicolor is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Spurge family, and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tragia praetervisa var. unicolor include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and snake bites. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
